texto: You are soft person you said. But you're soft as shit: it is very soft but stinking!
explicacao: Citação de Ilze Falb sobre temas ligados a humor. “You are soft person you said. But you're soft as shit: it is very soft but stinking!” articula humor, human-nature, humour em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como humour e sarcasm.

texto: Do you want to know why I don't like the so-called connoisseurs of arts? I hate hypocrisy. I'll give you an example: if the movie is colored and tells us about two friends who sit in the pool, fart into the water, get out of the pool and fart into each other's face it will be thrash, a lack of a culture and a third-rate comedy. But if the movie is black-and-white and tells us about two friends who cross the desert and peeing on each other, shit on the sand, and then they eat each other's shit, and on top of that they fucking each other's ass it will be a brilliant art house movie.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ilze Falb: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Do you want to know why I don't like the so-called connoisseurs of arts? I hate hypocrisy. I'll g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, art, hypocrisy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e estudos.
